title: Add non-mutating compact-style summary helper
depends_on: T005: linked session contract tests added
objective: Add a compact-style summary helper for workflow carryover that reuses compact prompt/message semantics without clearing or rewriting the source session.
expected_outputs: src/services/compact/prompt.ts （修改，如 sharing prompt helpers is required）
anti_goals: Do not call /compact command execution on the source session.
Do not run cleanup that clears source history.
Do not silently fall back to clear or inherit on failure.
acceptance_criteria: Helper can generate or surface failure for compact-style summary without mutating source messages.
Provider/runtime unavailable maps to visible error behavior for caller.
Tests prove source message inputs remain unchanged.
